case_title: ELLIS STREET STUDIOS VS. LARY KILPATRICK ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KILPATRICK, LARY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KILPATRICK, LARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 376 ELLIS STREET #103, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KILPATRICK, LARY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS AS TO DEFENDANT KILPATRICK, LARY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KILPATRICK, LARY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS SERVED MAY-31-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KILPATRICK, LARY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS AS TO DEFENDANT KILPATRICK, LARY
DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $56.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS
